creator: me@dan.me.uk
text:
Hi,

As I received exactly *zero* replies to this, and given the cost of the 
server, I have returned it to our supplier as it is unable to run FreeBSD.

One less FreeBSD server in the world - sorry :(


Thanks,

Daniel.

FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `kern/138171'.
> The individual assigned to look at your
> report is: freebsd-bugs. 
> 
> You can access the state of your problem report at any time
> via this link:
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=138171
> 
>> Category:       kern
>> Responsible:    freebsd-bugs
>> Synopsis:       FreeBSD hangs on boot on HP DL580 G5 system (16 cores, 64GB ram)
>> Arrival-Date:   Tue Aug 25 15:00:02 UTC 2009
